highlights: Built an AI-trivia gameplay engine that adapts question style by audience and keeps sessions dynamic.
Blended mini-golf mechanics with digital challenge loops, score progression, and retry-safe state handling.
Implemented interactive frontend flows optimized for in-person event use with fast-start, low-friction UX.
impact: Created a hybrid physical+digital game format that makes events more interactive and raises participation time per player.
one_liner: Interactive mini-golf companion app that layers AI-generated trivia, scoring, and progression over each round.
problem: Event mini-golf experiences often lose energy between holes and lack personalized engagement mechanics.
solution: Engineered a mobile-friendly game layer that injects adaptive trivia and reward progression into each putt sequence.
title: Quest Putt
visibility_note: Core repository is private. This entry summarizes architecture and working approach without exposing proprietary source.
